{% extends "!layout.html" %} {# Browser-tab title: " / SpeakUp" (forward-slash separator). The landing page keeps its "SpeakUp" H1 but its tab reads "Home". #} {%- block htmltitle %} {%- if pagename == master_doc %} Home / {{ docstitle|e }} {%- else %} {{ title|striptags|e }} / {{ docstitle|e }} {%- endif %} {%- endblock %}
